name: LiveAlerts
short: Twitch live notifications and YouTube upload alerts with templates and role pings.
description: Get notified when a Twitch channel goes live (Helix API, batched lookups, app token caching) or when a YouTube channel uploads a new video (RSS, no API key needed). Per-server subscriptions with target channel, custom message template ({streamer}, {title}, {url}, {game}) and optional role ping. Configurable offline behaviour (leave/edit/delete). Bilingual (DE/EN), with web dashboard integration.
author: Domekologe
install_msg:
Thanks for installing LiveAlerts!

Load it with `[p]load livealerts`.

For Twitch notifications, set app credentials once with:
`[p]set api twitch client_id,<your_client_id> client_secret,<your_client_secret>`

YouTube upload alerts work without any API key. Configure subscriptions via `[p]livealerts` or the PDC web dashboard (if installed).
end_user_data_statement: This cog does not store personal data about Discord users. It only stores per-server configuration: subscribed Twitch logins / YouTube channel IDs, target channels, message templates, ping roles and de-duplication markers (stream/video IDs).
